scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n api,frontend,landing -c green,blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w=api" "npm run dev -w=frontend" "npm run dev -w=landing"
scripts.dev:telegram: npx concurrently -n api,frontend,tunnel -c green,blue,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w=api" "npm run dev -w=frontend" "npm run tunnel -w=api"
